---
title: "Contact"
---

## Get in Touch

If you'd like to collaborate on a project or just say hi, feel free to reach out through any of the platforms below!

### Professional Links
- [**LinkedIn Profile**](www.linkedin.com/in/liza-schlachtovszky-b2ba782a9)
- [GitHub Profile](https://github.com/lizavagyok)

### Email
- **Email**: [schlachtovszky_liza@ceu.edu.com](mailto:schlachtovszky_liza@ceu.edu.com)

### Location
- Based in: Budapest, Hungary / Vienna, Austria (Central European University)
